title: potentilla tormentilla var. strictissima
intro: Potentilla tormentilla var. strictissima, also known as Tormentil, is a perennial plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its rich content of iridoid glycosides, including tormentin and cnicin, which possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tormentil include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions. Tormentil is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used internally to promote overall well-being and externally to accelerate wound healing.
